chosen_action.title: Repair selector live external action counting for measurement hold

why_this_action.summary: The selector was still choosing distribution_reset even though real external actions had already shipped and the reset executor had no fresh targets to promote, so the loop was manufacturing fake progress.
shared_findings_used: adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg remains flat and is still the primary success gate
market_intelligence_latest.json: comparison/distribution truths already exist and should be reused
marketing_workflow_audit_latest.json: same-family distribution/outreach windows are still in pending measurement
marketing_2026-05-24_hidstech_publisher_outreach.json: fresh live external action shipped at 2026-05-24T09:59:38+02:00
marketing_2026-05-24_aiagents_directory_submission.json: nested result.live_external_action shape must still count

result.expected_outcome: Future runs respect real short-window external executions and stop selecting skip-only reset work during live measurement windows.
